affected_commit.commit_title: F170000 - ONE HUNDRED SEVENTY THOUSAND - Day 427

content.classification_rationale: Commit title references F170000 fragment, but at this specific commit SHA, fragment-170000.md returns HTTP 404. File appears in later commits (e.g., b11ff0a4).
